# Research Summary: knowledge-base-help-center-stinger

**Generated by:** scripture-historian
**Depth tier consumed:** normal
**Time window covered:** 2025-11-20 to 2026-05-20 (6 months)
**Total files written this run:** 12 (2 internal, 10 external)
**Pre-existing files found in folder:** 7 external files (incorporated into index)
**Total files in research folder:** 19 (2 internal, 17 external)
**Source subfolders:** `internal/` (2 files), `external/` (17 files)

---

## The 5 most influential sources

### 1. `external/2026-05-20-ai-deflection-patterns.md`
**Why it matters:** The Command Brief's most under-specified section is AI deflection wiring. This synthesized source establishes the three-pattern taxonomy (platform-native chatbot, portal chat embedding, custom RAG endpoint) that gives `stinger-forge` a concrete decision tree for `guides/02-ai-deflection.md`. The Intercom standalone Fin plan (no seats required) is a material 2026 change that reshapes the entire platform-selection calculus. The llms.txt-as-Day-1 implementation guidance is immediately actionable.

### 2. `external/2026-05-20-document360-2026-features.md` + `external/2026-05-20-document360-mcp-release-notes.md`
**Why it matters:** Document360 has moved furthest in the 2026 feature race. The MCP server integration (Claude/ChatGPT/Copilot can read/write the KB), branch versioning for parallel product releases (v2.x and v3.x simultaneously), and 50+ language auto-translation on the Business tier make it the standout platform for enterprise-complexity KB needs. The Eddy AI citation analytics (tracking which articles are used in each AI response) is the most sophisticated content-gap instrumentation in the research.

### 3. `external/2026-05-20-helpscout-vs-intercom-cost-model.md`
**Why it matters:** The Command Brief's first critical directive is "always name the concrete trade-off before recommending." This source provides the only concrete cost model in the research: 10-person team, 2,000 conversations, $220/mo (Help Scout) vs $390-$990/mo (Intercom before Fin fees) + up to $800/mo for 40% Fin deflection. This is the worked example for `guides/00-platform-selection.md`'s pricing table. The "email-first SMB vs in-product SaaS journey" framing is the cleanest platform persona split found.

### 4. `external/2026-05-20-kb-analytics-content-gap.md`
**Why it matters:** The analytics loop is underserved in the existing Legion Army (per the Command Brief). This source synthesizes the CRAVA framework (5-KPI health scorecard), the search success rate formula (clicks + stays > 60s), the 4-fix playbook for no-result queries, and the weekly triage ritual. Together these give `stinger-forge` a complete, concrete `guides/05-analytics-loop.md` that can be handed directly to a content team.

### 5. `external/2026-05-20-readme-com-2026-features.md`
**Why it matters:** ReadMe's May 2026 launch (GitHub AI Writer, `@readme/cli`, Claude Opus 4.7 AI Agent) is the most significant product update in the comparison set after Document360's MCP server. It clearly positions ReadMe as "docs as code for developer-facing API hubs" rather than a general KB platform - a critical distinction for `guides/09-readme-dev-hub.md`'s audience profile. The Metrics API being Enterprise-only (and requiring a sales call) answers Command Brief Q4 definitively.

---

## 5 open questions (unresolved after research)

### OQ-1: HelpJuice 2026 feature and pricing status
No November 2025 - May 2026 sources were found for HelpJuice in this research run. The brief lists it as a platform candidate. `stinger-forge` should either: (a) include a placeholder profile in `guides/00-platform-selection.md` flagged as "needs 2026 research pass," or (b) reach out to HelpJuice's changelog at helpjuice.com/whats-new before authoring its platform guide. HelpJuice is positioned as a mid-market platform between Help Scout (SMB) and Document360 (enterprise) but its AI deflection maturity is unknown.

### OQ-2: Zendesk Guide AI Copilot 2026 state
The research found Zendesk Guide locale/translation content (from August 2025 and March 2026) but no specific 2026 update on Zendesk Guide's AI content authoring or AI deflection (Answer Bot v3 / Zendesk Copilot for Guide). Before authoring `guides/00-platform-selection.md`'s Zendesk entry, `stinger-forge` should check https://www.zendesk.com/blog/zendesk-copilot/ for current Copilot-for-Guide capabilities.

### OQ-3: Help Scout Docs API access and Search API details
The Command Brief references Help Scout's Search API for `guides/06-help-scout-docs.md`. The research covered Help Scout's pricing and AI deflection from a comparison perspective but not Help Scout Docs' technical API surface (Article Ratings API, Search API endpoint, Beacon article embedding). `stinger-forge` should fetch https://developer.helpscout.com/docs-api/ before writing `guides/06-help-scout-docs.md`.

### OQ-4: Document360 Business tier pricing (quote-only since August 2024)
Document360 moved to fully quote-based pricing in August 2024. No public price points were found in this research. The platform-selection matrix in `guides/00-platform-selection.md` will need a note directing users to request a quote. If pricing transparency is a hard requirement for the user's team, Document360 cannot be self-serve evaluated - this is a significant selection barrier.

### OQ-5: Intercom Articles vs Intercom Fin knowledge source configuration
The research confirms Fin can read Intercom Articles and external URLs/PDFs, but the specific configuration steps for connecting Fin to an external knowledge base (non-Intercom Articles) were not found in this research window. Before finalizing `guides/07-intercom-articles.md`, `stinger-forge` should check https://fin.ai/docs (or the Intercom Help Center) for the current Fin knowledge source setup workflow.

## Platform feature matrix (summary for stinger-forge)

| Platform | AI deflection native? | Versioning | Multi-language | MCP (2026) | Pricing model |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Help Scout Docs | AI Answers ($0.75/res) | Basic article history | Partial; no native multi-locale | No | Contact-based; transparent |
| Intercom Articles | Fin ($0.99/res; standalone available) | No | Fin: 45 languages; Articles: TMS | No | Per-seat + usage; opaque total |
| Document360 | Eddy AI (Search Suite: Business+) | Full branch versioning (parallel v) | 50+ languages auto-translate (Business+) | Yes (v12.3.1 Mar 2026) | Quote-based (opaque) |
| ReadMe.com | AI Agent + vector search | Git-backed version control | Partial | Yes (Apr 2026) | Tiered; Metrics API: Enterprise |
| Zendesk Guide | Answer Bot / Copilot AI | Basic; no branching | Native path-based locale routing; RTL | No | Per-agent; known |
| HelpJuice | Unknown (2026 gap) | Unknown | Unknown | Unknown | Contact sales |
